source_intake_record.raw_question_text: As shown in the figure, in the bridge circuit, when the slider is moved to point D and the sensitive galvanometer reading is 0, the bridge is in a balanced state. If it is measured that \( l_1 = 20 \, \text{cm} \), \( l_2 = 30 \, \text{cm} \), and \( R = 8 \, \Omega \), then \( R_x = \) ______\Omega.

solver must substitute l1=20 cm, l2=30 cm, and R=8 ohm into the correct proportion

the problem has a standard physics formula-based solution path for a balanced bridge
registry_passed=true, question_present=true, and answer_present=true support reliable downstream checking
